messages.content: Whereas for co-incorporated samples, 3M-3C--NML, 1M-5C--NML and 1C-5M--NML had no obvious characteristic peak of Cu-O and Mn-O, which proved that the content of Cu and Mn ions were very low [4].  换一种表述

In the case of the samples co-incorporated as 3M-3C--NML, 1M-5C--NML, and 1C-5M--NML, there was an absence of distinct Cu-O and Mn-O peaks, indicating that the Cu and Mn ion concentrations were notably low [4].
Whereas for co-incorporated samples, 3M-3C--NML, 1M-5C--NML and 1C-5M--NML had no obvious characteristic peak of Cu-O and Mn-O, which proved that the content of Cu and Mn ions were very low [4].

For the samples where co-incorporation was applied, specifically 3M-3C--NML, 1M-5C--NML, and 1C-5M--NML, the characteristic peaks for Cu-O and Mn-O were conspicuously absent. This lack of distinct peaks demonstrated that the concentration of Cu and Mn ions in these samples was relatively minimal [4].

For NML, the peak at 1618 cm-1 is allocated to the C=O stretching vibration of the carboxyl group [1-3]. Whereas for co-incorporated samples, 3M-3C--NML, 1M-5C--NML and 1C-5M--NML had no obvious characteristic peak of Cu-O and Mn-O, which proved that the content of Cu and Mn ions were very low [4].

In the case of NML, the absorption peak observed at 1618 cm-1 is attributed to the C=O stretching vibration arising from the carboxyl group [1-3]. In contrast, when examining the co-incorporated samples, namely 3M-3C--NML, 1M-5C--NML, and 1C-5M--NML, there is a notable absence of any distinct peaks corresponding to Cu-O and Mn-O vibrations. This indicates that the amounts of Cu and Mn ions present in these samples are considerably low [4].
The ligand to metal electron transfer is the key factor in MOF materials’ photocatalytic process  换一种表述
Electron transfer from the ligand to the metal is the principal mechanism driving the photocatalytic activity in Metal-Organic Framework (MOF) materials.

Due to the ligand to metal electron transfer is the key factor in MOF materials’ photocatalytic process, the Cu2+ and Mn2+ co-incorporation can have obvious effect on the photocatalytic performance [1, 2]. 换一种表述

Since electron transfer from the ligand to the metal is critical for the photocatalytic process in Metal-Organic Framework (MOF) materials, the simultaneous incorporation of Cu2+ and Mn2+ can significantly influence the photocatalytic efficiency [1, 2].
比较  的英文名词形式
The English noun form for "comparison" is "comparison."
As in comparison, the selectivity based on 1M-5C--NML is higher than the most of the reported ones (Table S3)。
In comparison, the selectivity exhibited by 1M-5C--NML surpasses that of the majority of reported cases (refer to Table S3).
As in comparison, the selectivity based on 1M-5C--NML is higher than the most of the reported ones (Table S3). 有语法错误吗

Yes, there is a minor grammatical error in the sentence. The phrase "higher than the most of" should be revised for correctness. Here's the corrected sentence:

"The selectivity of 1M-5C--NML is higher than that of most reported cases, as shown in comparison (see Table S3)."

This revised sentence corrects the error by using "that of" to correctly compare the selectivity of 1M-5C--NML to the selectivity of "most reported cases." It also ensures coherence by reordering the sentence structure.

Fig. S6a and b show that the 1M-5C--NML still maintained approximately 80%, 92%, 89% and 84% of CH4, CO, H2 and HCOOH yield, respectively, compared with its initial activities after 5 cycling runs (each run for 2 hours).

Figures S6a and S6b indicate that after five catalytic cycles (with each cycle lasting for 2 hours), the 1M-5C--NML sample retained roughly 80%, 92%, 89%, and 84% of its initial yields for CH4, CO, H2, and HCOOH, respectively, when compared to its original activity.
